assertions.fullName: CVF v1.7.1 checkpoint/resume conformance creates a validated checkpoint without executing the proposal
CVF v1.7.1 checkpoint/resume conformance resumes a validated checkpoint and records execution
CVF v1.7.1 checkpoint/resume conformance fails closed when resuming a missing checkpoint
CVF v1.7.1 session resume conformance resumes a checkpoint only when session and token match
CVF v1.7.1 session resume conformance fails closed when session id does not match the checkpoint
CVF v1.7.1 session resume conformance fails closed when resume token does not match the checkpoint
CVF v1.7.1 session audit linkage conformance records checkpoint/session linkage into the execution journal after resume
CVF v1.7.1 session audit linkage conformance preserves checkpoint resume metadata even when simulateOnly avoids journal writes
CVF v1.7.1 session audit linkage conformance does not write audit linkage when resume authorization fails
